content: SP Single Logout URL (support POST and Redirect binding):

comment.text: This translation key represents the URL for single sign-out (SSO) logout functionality on a Single Sign-On (SSO) provider. It is used in the PortalSettings categories integration and appears as a placeholder text in a UI field, guiding users to enter the correct SSO logout callback URL.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"

The translation 'доставчика на услуги' (service provider) is used instead of 'SP' (Service Provider) in the context of Single Sign-On. While 'SP' stands for Service Provider, in SSO terminology, 'SP Single Logout' refers to the Service Provider's logout URL. The current translation implies the URL belongs to the service provider, but it changes the technical term 'SP' into a descriptive phrase that might confuse users looking for the 'SP' acronym or specific technical designation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: SP URL за единично отписване (поддръжка на POST и пренасочване):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"
The translation refers to 'Assertion Consumer URL' (Adresa URL spotřebitele tvrzení) instead of 'Single Logout URL'. These are two different technical concepts in SAML/SSO.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: URL pro Single Logout SP (podpora vazeb POST a přesměrování):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"

The translation refers to 'Assertion Consumer Service' (ACS) instead of 'Single Logout' (SLO). In SAML/SSO, the Assertion Consumer Service is for login/authentication, whereas the English text specifically asks for the Single Logout URL.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: URL de cierre de sesión única de SP (compatible con POST y redirección):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"

The term 'Redirect binding' is incorrectly translated as 'uudelleenohjausvelvoite' (redirect obligation/requirement), which changes the technical meaning from a protocol binding type to a mandatory requirement.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: SP yksittäinen uloskirjautuminen URL (tukee POST- ja uudelleenohjaussidontaa):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"

The translation 'Terminar Sessão Único PS' is a poor translation of 'SP Single Logout URL'. 'SP' (Service Provider) is a technical term that should not be translated as 'PS', and 'Single Logout' is incorrectly translated as 'Terminar Sessão Único'. Most importantly, the word 'URL' is missing entirely from the Portuguese translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: URL de Single Logout do SP (suporta POST e Redirect binding):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Redirecționare legătură' is a literal and incorrect translation of 'Redirect binding'. In technical SSO/SAML contexts, 'binding' refers to the protocol mechanism, and 'legătură' means 'link/connection', which is incorrect here. It should be 'legătură de redirecționare' or simply 'binding de redirecționare'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Adresa URL a deconectării unice a furnizorului de servicii (acceptă POST și binding de redirecționare):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'ඒ.ස.නි.' (A.S.N.) is an incorrect abbreviation for 'URL'. In Sinhala, 'URL' is typically transliterated as 'URL' or referred to as 'සබැඳි ලිපිනය' (web address). 'ඒ.ස.නි.' does not convey the meaning of a Uniform Resource Locator.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: SP තනි නික්මීමේ URL එක (POST සහ Redirect බැඳීම් සඳහා සහාය දක්වයි):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'enkratna odjava' is a literal translation of 'single logout' but in technical SSO contexts in Slovenian, 'enotna odjava' is the standard term for 'Single Logout'. Furthermore, 'podporni' (supporting) is used incorrectly as an adjective for the protocols; it should describe the capability of the URL.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: SP URL za enotno odjavo (podporuje vezavo POST in preusmeritve):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with ":" but translation ends with ")"
The term 'POST' (an HTTP method) was incorrectly translated as 'ĐĂNG TẢI' (which means 'uploading'). In a technical SSO context, 'POST' should remain 'POST'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: URL đăng xuất SP một lần (hỗ trợ POST và chuyển hướng ràng buộc):

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Single Logout' is translated as 'e vetme e daljes', which means 'the only logout'. In the context of SSO, 'Single Logout' is a technical term (SLO) meaning one logout session that terminates all sessions. The correct technical translation should reflect 'Single Logout' as a concept, not 'the only logout'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: URL e Single Logout të SP (mbështet lidhjen POST dhe Redirect):
